reviews.author: Chuck Lever
reviews.summary: Identified and applied the patches, noting they were successfully tested on nfsd-testing.
reviews.raw_body:
From: Chuck Lever <chuck.lever@oracle.com>

On Tue, 26 May 2026 12:38:44 -0400, Jeff Layton wrote:
> Some fixes for the callback channel machinery. These problems were
> mostly found via agentic scans.

Applied to nfsd-testing, thanks!

[1/2] nfsd: defer setting NFSD4_CALLBACK_RUNNING in deleg_reaper
      commit: 02b9bb6ab68a77b1112d48411e4e08308a077ea0
[2/2] nfsd: clear CALLBACK_RUNNING on failed delegation recall queue
      commit: e02bd0e5a983b4d617dd2222c81c7f057132c211

--
Chuck Lever <chuck.lever@oracle.com>

2026-05-26.patch_summary: The patch series addresses issues in the NFSd callback channel machinery, specifically deferring the setting of NFSD4_CALLBACK_RUNNING in deleg_reaper and clearing CALLBACK_RUNNING on failed delegation recall queue.
